name: License Compliance

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev

  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev

jobs:
  license-check:
    name: Verify Open Source Licenses
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Install Project Dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install License Checker
        run: npm install -g license-checker

      - name: Generate JSON License Report
        run: license-checker --json --out licenses.json

      - name: Generate Text License Report
        run: license-checker > licenses.txt

      - name: Display License Summary
        run: license-checker --summary

      - name: Check for Disallowed Licenses
        shell: bash
        run: |
          ALLOWED_LICENSES="MIT|Apache-2.0|BSD|BSD-2-Clause|BSD-3-Clause|ISC|CC0-1.0|Python-2.0"

          while IFS= read -r line
          do
            if [[ "$line" =~ licenses:\ (.*)$ ]]; then
              license="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"

              if ! [[ "$license" =~ ^($ALLOWED_LICENSES)$ ]]; then
                echo "Disallowed License Found: $license"
                exit 1
              fi
            fi
          done < licenses.txt

      - name: Upload License Reports
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: license-report
          path: |
            licenses.json
            licenses.txt
